creator: bruno@ruomad.net
text:
Daniel, thanks for your review, I will look into the issues you mention and update the patch accordingly.
The 3 patches (libpki openca-ocspd and py-certbot-plugin-gandi) I submitted are the one I use on my system :
- freebsd 13.1, built from source
- ports built with poudriere
- arch x86_64

So far they seem to work well… I have been using them like for a year or so
